author: Netflix Anime
text:
Sparks of Tomorrow | Official Trailer | Netflix Anime
In an alternate 20th century Kyoto, two brothers dream of bringing about the Age of Electricity with their 20th Century Electrical Catalog. However, when Seiroku Sakamoto brings the catalog with him to war and never returns, his younger brother Kihachi Sakamoto is left by himself.

One day, a chance meeting with Inako Momokawa, the daughter of a sake brewer, reunites Kihachi with the lost catalog and kickstarts this dream once more. However, he isn't the only one who wants the catalog...

#sparks_of_tomorrow #二十世紀電氣目録

Sparks of Tomorrow comes exclusively to Netflix on July 5, with new episodes available weekly!
https://www.netflix.com/SparksofTomorrow

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/33okaL0

Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

In an alternate past, an unlikely duo team up to look for a missing catalog that could bring electricity to the smoke-filled streets of Kyoto.

author: Netflix Anime
text:
Their First Race | 100 METERS | Clip | Netflix Anime
When Togashi and Komiya lined up for their humble race beneath the train tracks, did either of them expect their encounters on the track for years to come?

This video is available in multi-audio. Click the settings icon then select audio track!
